title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to the Tenant to Account with pending invite
scenario: Verify data correctness when switching from an account linked to a tenant to an account with a pending invite
steps: Log in with Account linked to Tenant A, go to Support > App, and confirm Tenant A info is present.
Log out, log in with a different Account that is not linked to any Tenant but has a pending invite, go to Support > App, and confirm Tenant name and ID are not present on the card.
expected: Data is correct after moving from an Account linked to a Tenant to an Account with a pending invite. Tenant A info is present for the first account, and Tenant name and ID are not present on the card for the second account.
